description: petite young vampire girl with fangs, pale lavender-white long straight hair (#F1ECF7), black ribbon bow hairpin, deep crimson red eyes (#8B0000), dark purple-charcoal gothic dress (#423749) with off-shoulder neckline and wide black waist belt, deep burgundy dark red layered ruffled frills at dress hem (#870A36), ruffled cuffs at sleeves, dark gray-brown opaque tights, no weapons, no wings, no tail, facing right, 34-color limited palette pixel art style
